_comment: Hold messages played to the user while cmd/voice reconnects to the dialog plane (LLM/business backend). Loaded at startup via -hold-messages (default scripts/hold/hold_messages.json). Customize per language/tenant. The TTS engine renders these on demand — phrases also listed in cmd/voice prewarmTexts() get cached on first use, so subsequent reconnects play with near-zero TTFB.
give_up: 抱歉，当前服务暂时不可用，请稍后再试。
